recommendations.title: The Thinning: New World Order
recommendations.overview: Blake Redding is trapped in this dark room wanting to protect his love so the only thing he will do is escape like no failed student has done before.

recommendations.title: The Thinning
recommendations.overview: In a post-apocalyptic future where population control is dictated by a high-school aptitude test, two students discover the test is smoke and mirrors hiding a larger conspiracy.

recommendations.title: Smiley
recommendations.overview: After learning of an urban legend in which a demented serial killer named SMILEY can be summoned through the internet, mentally fragile Ashley must decide whether she is losing her mind or becoming Smiley's next victim.

recommendations.title: The Package
recommendations.overview: Experienced Green Beret sergeant Johnny Gallagher is escorting a prisoner, Airborne Ranger Thomas Boyette, back to the US, but Boyette escapes and Gallagher must risk life and limb to catch him.

recommendations.title: Hick
recommendations.overview: A pistol-packing teen meets an unstable rebel and a cocaine-snorting drifter as she hitchhikes her way out West.

recommendations.title: Good Boys
recommendations.overview: A group of young boys on the cusp of becoming teenagers embark on an epic quest to fix their broken drone before their parents get home.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Life
recommendations.overview: The Tramp and his dog companion struggle to survive in the inner city.

recommendations.title: Cocaine Cowboys
recommendations.overview: In the 1980s, ruthless Colombian cocaine barons invaded Miami with a brand of violence unseen in this country since Prohibition-era Chicago - and it put the city on the map. "Cocaine Cowboys" is the true story of how Miami became the drug, murder and

recommendations.title: Incoming
recommendations.overview: Their first week of high school. The biggest party of the year. Mistakes will be made as four teenage boys navigate a night of mayhem and debauchery.
